title: Warren Buffett Bets His Fortune On One Of 9 'Can't Lose' Stocks
text: What do investors do when they can get 5% for taking no risk? Find S&P 500 stocks they can make even more on by taking little risk — a tall order only a few can meet.

title: Axon's Two Biggest Growth Opportunities
text: Axon's growth story is far from over.

title: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Axon Enterprise, Inc (AXON) is a Trending Stock
text: Axon (AXON) has been one of the stocks most watched by Zacks.com users lately. So, it is worth exploring what lies ahead for the stock.

title: The 7 Most Undervalued Industrial Stocks to Buy Now: August 2023
text: The rally in tech stocks that lifted the broader market is falling victim to the dog days of August. Investors looking to make a pivot away from overvalued tech stocks may want to look at undervalued industrial stocks.

title: 2 Defensive Stocks to Buy During the Market Downturn
text: Here are a couple of defensive stocks to load up on ahead of what could be a bumpy close to August.

title: Amidst Rising Rates, Don't Forget About Growth!
text: August is traditionally a weak month for the markets, and this August has been no different, with a pullback in both stocks and bonds. Macroeconomic factors have driven the selloff, with rising interest rates impacting stock prices, especially in growth sectors. Despite market conditions, there are opportunities for growth-oriented investors, such as Celsius Holdings and Axon Enterprises, which show strong revenue growth and profitability.

title: Stun Gun Maker Axon Enterprise's Profit Grew 152%; AI Enhances Its Products
text: Axon Enterprise expects its full-year revenue to grow around 28%. The Taser maker's stock jumped after the company's strong earnings report.

title: Markets Advanced at Midday as Consumer Inflation Rose Less Than Expected
text: U.S. equities gained at midday on Thursday, Aug. 10, 2023 after the Labor Department reported consumer prices increased less than expected in July.

title: S&P Gains and Losses Today: Index Falls as Tech Stocks Lose Ground
text: The S&P 500 dipped 0.7% on Wednesday, Aug. 9, 2023 as tech stocks fell ahead of Thursday's key consumer inflation report.

title: Axon Enterprise get a jolt on higher full-year revenue guidance
text: Axon Enterprise stock is on the rise Wednesday after the company's second-quarter earnings surpassed expectations and its guidance improved.  The TASER producer posted earnings of $1.11 per share, up from $0.44 a year earlier and above the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.62.

title: Why Axon Enterprise Stock Jumped 18 Percent Today
text: Axon Enterprise beat on both top and bottom lines last night -- with (pro forma) earnings nearly twice what Wall Street had predicted. High margin and recurring revenues from Axon's services business helped push Axon's cash flow much higher.

title: 3 Stocks to Buy After Heavy Insider Buying
text: Many investors are motivated to sell a stock when they notice that company insiders are dumping their shares. However, company insiders can sell a stock for many reasons, and many of those have nothing to do with the stock's performance.

title: Axon (AXON) Reports Q2 Earnings: What Key Metrics Have to Say
text: Although the revenue and EPS for Axon (AXON) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended June 2023, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

title: Axon stock surges more than 10% on Taser, AI sales strength
text: Axon Enterprises Inc. shares rallied in the extended session Tuesday after the Taser, body-camera and safety-device maker topped Wall Street expectations.

title: What's in the Offing for Axon (AXON) This Earnings Season?
text: Axon's (AXON) Q2 performance is expected to have benefited from strong demand for TASER 7 devices and Axon Fleet 3 systems. However, escalating costs might have weighed on performance.

title: Axon: Bringing Law Enforcement Into The 21st Century, Part II
text: Axon provides a series of products that equip law enforcement agencies with the tools necessary to safely and effectively conduct their operations. Atop its ecosystem of market-leading hardware products, Axon has built a very compelling software business. We could think of this as a "Walled-Garden," akin to that which Apple has built over the last couple decades or so.
